summary: Comprehensive UI testing of PlayXBets Cricket Exchange and Football Live pages completed. All features working correctly on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Table-based icebook9-style layout with Back (#72BBEF blue) and Lay (#FAA9BA pink) odds boxes rendering correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PlayXBets UI redesign tested successfully. Cricket Exchange (/exchange) and Football Live (/football-live) pages both working with icebook9-style table layout. Back=#72BBEF, Lay=#FAA9BA colors verified. Mobile responsive design working with bottom navigation and bet slip modal.

cricket_exchange.match_odds_table: PASS - Back/Lay columns with 3 odds each per team
cricket_exchange.back_odds_click: PASS - Adds selection to bet slip
cricket_exchange.lay_odds_click: PASS - Adds selection to bet slip
cricket_exchange.session_markets_odi: PASS - Format toggle works, shows ODI sessions
cricket_exchange.bet_slip_desktop: PASS - Shows selections with stake input and profit calculation
cricket_exchange.mobile_bottom_nav: PASS - Home, Cricket, Bet Slip, Soccer visible
cricket_exchange.mobile_bet_slip_modal: PASS - Opens with selections, stake input, Place Bet button

football_live.match_selector: PASS - 3 matches selectable, updates odds display
football_live.bet_slip_functionality: PASS - Selections added, stake input works
football_live.mobile_responsive: PASS - All markets display correctly on mobile

design_verification.text_contrast: PASS - Dark text on light odds cells, white text on dark background
design_verification.responsive_breakpoints: PASS - Desktop bet slip hidden on mobile, mobile nav hidden on desktop

mocked_apis.details: Real-time odds are simulated on frontend. Bet placement only updates local state/balance. No actual backend bet processing.
